ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, company) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the researcher account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the algorithm (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the algorithm has been cited */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the algorithm is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes in the dataset */,
  "num_videos" INTEGER /* Number of videos in the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been cited */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., % for accuracy) */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of the performance metric (e.g., 0-100 for accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the performance result (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the performance result has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or conference where the publication was presented */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_publications" (
  "algorithm_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm-publication link */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the link (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_publications_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_publications" (
  "dataset_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-publication link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the link (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., upload, download, view) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm file */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the algorithm file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the algorithm file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_files_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
